creator: bsd@bunker-ranch.com
text:
Model:  Gigabyte GA-MA790X-DS4 rev 1.0

Northbridge chipset/socket:  AM790X, socket AM2.

Boots and runs well with quad-CPU Phenom (9750) and 4 GB ECC memory, SATA and IDE drives.  Sound, serial, USB, Firewire, RAID untested.  On-board RealTek Ethernet flaky; using PCI card instead.

How-To-Repeat: FreeBSD homebox.bunker-ranch.com 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Sun Feb 24 10:35:36 UTC 2008     root@driscoll.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
